observations: GET /v1/audit returns 200 for any authenticated user (viewer included) — no RBAC gating on read, as designed.
DELETE /v1/audit/:id returns 403 with 'Insufficient permissions. Required: admin' for viewer — requireRole('admin') middleware correctly denies.
DELETE /v1/audit/:id returns 200 for admin; deleted=1; audit.entry.deleted entry appended with previousHash = prior tip entryHash.
Hash chain verified: second delete's previousHash (af0b18b9...) matches first delete's entryHash, confirming chain integrity.
Roles read from UserEntity.role: login endpoint reads user.role from PG, embeds in JWT roles claim; no Clerk org claim present.
Server runs in OSS mode (CAUSEFLOW_RUNTIME=oss) — auth uses local JWT verification, no Clerk dependency.
Integrated verification against live OSS server on port 5170 confirmed all checks pass.
